english: Defender, thanks again for the assist.With this data, I may be able to create a more stable portal (in the future, of course, not in the middle of a darn war). Plus, who KNOWS what we could do with this info!Anyways, I was digging through my papers and notes and came across this card. Never seen it before. I thought maybe you'd left it behind?Thanks again,Lezzi

Defenders and friends of Lion's Arch,Our great city has long been home to Mist portals, linking us to battles in realms beyond ours. They call it the Mist War, and while I don't claim to fully understand the workings of the cosmos, time has taught us not to ignore a threat.I am calling on the allies of Lion's Arch to redouble their efforts to establish our front lines in the Mists. For a short time, the coffers of the Captain's Council will be opened to furnish you with a fine bounty for your accomplishments. Meet me at Fort Marriner for details.—Magnus

Delaqua Investigations is looking for a levelheaded, crafty individual to assist our lead investigator in investigative and clerical work. Pay is negotiable. Applicants must have good social instincts and be willing to discreetly (if possible) dig for evidence; connections and access to various organizations and social circles are a plus, but not required. Must be good with a pen and quick on your feet. A strong stomach is recommended. Lunch is not provided.  All applications can be left with the bartender of the Dead End Bar in the Eastern Commons.  —Marjory Delaqua, Lead Investigator
